login.tagline: One supplier to work with. A whole consortium behind it.
login.usePhoneInstead: Sign in with phone number instead
login.demoModeNotice: Demo mode — no SMS/WhatsApp provider is connected yet, so here's your code:
login.tokenInvalid: That token isn't valid for a {{role}} account.
login.networkError: Couldn't reach Saathi right now. Check your connection and try again.
login.phoneNotRegistered: That number isn't registered to a workshop yet. Ask your cluster coordinator to add it.
login.resendNetworkError: Couldn't send a new code — check your connection and try again.

sublots.title: My Orders
sublots.subtitle: Sub-lots assigned to you. Other workshops are never shown.
sublots.deliveredAwaiting: Delivered — awaiting verification. No action needed from you right now.
sublots.howManyDelivered: How many did you actually deliver? (out of {{qty}})
sublots.trustTooltip: Trust score = how reliably you deliver on time, without defects. Higher score means more orders come your way.
sublots.reviewPending: Saathi's quality checker needs a closer look at this one before it can move forward — no action needed from you, this will update on its own once it's resolved.
sublots.confirmDeliverPrompt: Mark all {{qty}} units as delivered? This starts verification and can't be undone.

capacity.title: My capacity
capacity.subtitle: Available Inventory is what you can still commit — In Transit and Serving Capacity update automatically as orders move through delivery.
capacity.noneYet: No product capacity set up yet.
capacity.servingCapacityTooltip: How many more units you can take on right now — Available inventory minus what's already In transit.
capacity.plainHelp: In transit = already promised to other orders. Available inventory = your total stock.

trust.title: My trust score
trust.explanationColdStart: No completed sub-lots yet. Starting score: {{score}}

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Sub-lots assigned to you by the allocation engine, most recent first.
notifications.meta: Order #{{orderId}} · Sub-lot #{{sublotId}} · View in My Orders

shop.heroTitle: One supplier. A whole consortium behind it.
shop.heroSubtitle: Every listing here is bulk capacity pooled across trust-scored SFURTI workshops — you deal with Saathi, we deal with coordination.
shop.noProductsWithFilters: No products match your search and filters.

bulkOrder.deadlineTooSoon: Deadline must be at least a day out.
bulkOrder.paymentPayOnDeliveryBlurb: Settle the full amount after delivery
bulkOrder.paymentAdvancePlusBalanceBlurb: Balance is billed once your order is delivered

orderDetail.statFailedBanner: This order could not be fulfilled. Contact support for details.
orderDetail.statCancelledBanner: This order was cancelled and reserved capacity has been released.
orderDetail.statQualityFailedBanner: Every item in this order failed quality check — you have not been billed for it. Contact support if you'd like a replacement.
orderDetail.confirmCancelText: Cancel this order? Reserved workshop capacity will be released and this can't be undone.
orderDetail.yourSubmittedPhotoSubtitle: This is the photo you uploaded — confirming it's what was analyzed.
orderDetail.reportDefectSubtitle: We flag defects at the order level — individual workshops are never identified.
orderDetail.deliveredNotice: This order is already marked delivered — a defect reported now still runs a real quality check and affects the responsible workshop's trust score.
orderDetail.descriptionPlaceholder: What's wrong with the delivered goods?
orderDetail.connectionRetrying: Connection struggled with the full-size photo — retrying with a smaller version…
orderDetail.defectFailedMessage: Defect confirmed — the responsible workshop's trust score has been updated.
orderDetail.defectFailedWorkshopFaultMessage: Defect confirmed — you will not be charged for these units, and the responsible workshop's trust score has been updated.
orderDetail.defectReviewMessage: Couldn't automatically verify this one — flagged for manual review.
orderDetail.defectOkMessage: Checked — no workshop-fault defect found against the spec.

admin.title: Needs review
admin.subtitle: Sub-lots whose verification never reached a final answer — either a call crashed mid-flight (Stuck) or the model deliberately deferred to a human (Needs review). Retrying redoes the same verification call; nothing here is guessed or auto-resolved.
admin.noVerdict: No verdict was ever recorded — the previous attempt likely failed before reaching Gemini.
admin.allocationSubtitle: Buyers never see which workshops fulfilled their order — that's the point. This shows the real, underlying split so you can verify the consortium mechanism actually worked, not just claim it.
admin.allocationNotFound: No order found with that ID.
admin.allocationSummary_one: Split across {{count}} real workshop, {{total}} units total.
admin.allocationSummary_other: Split across {{count}} real workshops, {{total}} units total.
admin.allocationSummaryFactoryOnly: Fulfilled entirely by the factory fallback — no consortium workshop had enough eligible capacity for this order. {{total}} units total.
